title: ClickExpandedPath
content:
# ClickExpandedPath

Inherits from: click.Path


A Click path argument that returns a ``Path``, not a string.


## Methods


### convert(value: str, param: Optional[click.core.Parameter], ctx: Optional[click.core.Context]) -> Any

Return a ``Path`` from the string ``click`` would have created with the given options.
summary: A Click path argument that returns a ``Path``, not a string.
